# Pull request

## Summary

<!-- One-sentence description. -->

## Related issues

<!-- #123 / none -->

## Type

- [ ] feat (new user-visible capability)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] test (test-only change)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] chore (scaffolding, deps, release housekeeping)
- [ ] ci (workflow changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional-commits subject line (e.g., `feat(spark-mcp): ...`)
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff check`, `ruff format --check`, `mypy src` all pass locally
- [ ] Coverage stayed at or above 80% on spark-mcp/src/spark_mcp/
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Security-sensitive area? Tag the PR with `needs-security-review`
      and flag reviewers.
- [ ] Breaking change? Call it out in the description + CHANGELOG.

<!-- Exact commands you ran. Include any integration-test invocation. -->
